_comment: Edit these to swap in real customer quotes. Keep `name` and `quote`; the rest are optional. Featured items show first.

items.name: Aline U.
items.quote: The buffet plate at lunch is exactly what home tastes like. I stop by twice a week.

items.name: Patrick M.
items.quote: Cold Mutzig, charcoal brochettes, easy nights. The Mall IWACU is my Friday default.

items.name: Diane K.
items.quote: I came for a back massage and ended up booking the steam combo. Genuinely the best hour of my week.

items.name: Eric N.
items.quote: Everything you need on a normal evening — groceries on the way in, a plate inside, and a quick steam before home.

items.name: Sarah T.
items.quote: Service was warm from the door. The Mall Salad is huge and the staff remembered my order on the second visit.
